question: Trong Tổng Công ty Cổ phần Địa ốc Sài Gòn (SaigonRes), ông Phạm Đình Thành giữ vị trí gì trong Hội đồng Quản trị và đang sở hữu/đại diện bao nhiêu cổ phần; đồng thời trong Ban điều hành ông giữ chức danh gì và có trình độ chuyên môn ra sao?
reference_answer: Trong Hội đồng Quản trị, ông Phạm Đình Thành là Thành viên điều hành, sở hữu/đại diện 3.716.183 cổ phần (tỷ lệ 6,19%). Trong Ban điều hành, ông giữ chức Phó Tổng Giám Đốc, với trình độ chuyên môn Thạc sỹ Quản lý dự án và Kỹ sư Xây dựng (sinh năm 1980).
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 236, danh sách HĐQT) cho biết ông là Thành viên điều hành HĐQT với 3.716.183 cổ phần (6,19%); Hop-2 (chunk 75, danh sách Ban điều hành) cho biết chức danh Phó Tổng Giám Đốc và trình độ Thạc sỹ QLDA, Kỹ sư Xây dựng — không chunk nào chứa đủ cả hai vế.

question: Tổng Công ty Cổ phần Địa ốc Sài Gòn sở hữu bao nhiêu phần trăm Công ty TNHH MTV Địa ốc Sài Gòn Hòa Bình và vốn điều lệ của công ty con này là bao nhiêu; công ty này đang làm chủ đầu tư dự án ở đâu và tổng mức đầu tư dự kiến bao nhiêu?
reference_answer: Công ty TNHH MTV Địa ốc Sài Gòn Hòa Bình do Tổng Công ty sở hữu 100%, vốn điều lệ 80 tỷ đồng (hoạt động xây dựng, kinh doanh bất động sản). Công ty đang làm chủ đầu tư dự án tại Xã Tân Vinh, huyện Lương Sơn, tỉnh Hòa Bình, diện tích khu đất khoảng 49ha (đã đền bù được 22,7 ha), với tổng mức đầu tư dự kiến 1.300 tỷ đồng.
bridge_entity: Công ty TNHH MTV Địa ốc Sài Gòn Hòa Bình
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 106, bảng công ty con) cho tỷ lệ sở hữu 100% và vốn điều lệ 80 tỷ; Hop-2 (chunk 92, mô tả dự án) cho vị trí (Tân Vinh, Lương Sơn, Hòa Bình), 49ha và tổng mức đầu tư 1.300 tỷ — cần ghép cả hai.

question: Phòng Vật tư - Thiết bị y tế trong bệnh viện chịu sự lãnh đạo trực tiếp của ai; trong danh mục nhiệm vụ của phòng, nhiệm vụ về tổ chức học tập/tiếp nhận thiết bị y tế mới và nhiệm vụ về đấu thầu, mua sắm, bảo dưỡng sửa chữa TTBYT gồm những gì?
reference_answer: Phòng Vật tư - Thiết bị y tế là phòng nghiệp vụ chịu sự lãnh đạo trực tiếp của Giám đốc Bệnh viện. Về tổ chức học tập/tiếp nhận thiết bị mới: tổ chức học tập cho các thành viên trong Bệnh viện về bảo quản, sử dụng, sửa chữa và tiếp nhận các TTBYT mới. Về đấu thầu, mua sắm và bảo dưỡng: tổ chức duy tu, bảo dưỡng, sửa chữa TTBYT kịp thời, và tham mưu trong công tác đấu thầu, mua sắm và thanh lý tài sản, TTBYT theo quy định của Nhà nước.
bridge_entity: Phòng Vật tư - Thiết bị y tế (Giám đốc Bệnh viện)
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 57) nêu phòng chịu lãnh đạo của Giám đốc Bệnh viện + nhiệm vụ 1-3 (gồm tổ chức học tập/tiếp nhận TTBYT mới); Hop-2 (chunk 58) nêu nhiệm vụ 4-8 (duy tu bảo dưỡng, tham mưu đấu thầu mua sắm) — danh mục nhiệm vụ bị tách đôi giữa hai chunk (bridge shared entity Giám đốc/Bệnh viện).

question: Her Majesty's Cayman Islands Prison Service (HMCIPS) manages how many facilities and which ones, and how large is the department's staff?
reference_answer: HMCIPS is responsible for managing three facilities in the Cayman Islands: HMP Northward and the Enhanced Rehabilitation Unit (ERU), which both provide accommodation for males (adults and minors), and HMP Fairbanks, which is a facility specifically for women. The department has 186 staff, 90% of whom interact daily with people in prison and the public.
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 87) names the three facilities (HMP Northward, ERU, HMP Fairbanks); Hop-2 (chunk 92) gives the 186-strong staff and the 90% figure — neither chunk holds both the facilities and the staff size.

question: In 2022, how did the Department of Community Rehabilitation (DCR) strengthen its senior management team, and what impact did its strengthened multi-agency partnerships have on victim service cases?
reference_answer: In 2022 the DCR grew its senior management team: two staff were promoted from within the organisation, and additional management roles for Quality Assurance and Human Resources Manager were approved and those senior posts were filled. Separately, the strengthening of partnerships between the DCR and other agencies resulted in an exponential increase in the number of victim service cases for the Department.
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 114) gives the senior-management growth (two promotions, new QA and HR Manager posts filled); Hop-2 (chunk 120) gives the multi-agency-collaboration result (exponential increase in victim service cases) — two distinct DCR facts in separate chunks.

question: Which cybersecurity framework guides Disney's information security program and to whom does the Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) ultimately report, and how often does the Audit Committee receive cybersecurity reports from the CISO?
reference_answer: Disney's information security program is guided by the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) Cybersecurity Framework (and other globally recognized frameworks). Day-to-day management is the responsibility of the CISO, who reports to the Chief Information & Data Officer and the Chief Security Officer, both of whom report to the Chief Financial Officer. At least once per year, the Audit Committee receives reports from the CISO concerning the company's cybersecurity and data security risks.
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 86) gives the NIST framework and the CISO's reporting chain up to the CFO; Hop-2 (chunk 87) gives the 'at least once per year' Audit Committee reporting frequency — framework/chain and cadence live in different chunks.

question: According to Canada's National AI Strategy, how much AI compute capacity will Canada require for its commercial players by 2030, and what advantage does Canada's electricity grid give its data centres?
reference_answer: Analysis suggests Canada will require about 5.5 gigawatts (GW) worth of AI compute for its commercial players by 2030. More than 83 percent of the country's electricity grid comes from renewable and low-emission sources (primarily hydro, nuclear, and wind), enabling its data centres to operate on some of the cleanest power in the world; data centres relying on renewable/low-emission sources reduce their total operating emissions by up to 90 percent.
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 164, Sovereign Compute) gives the 5.5 GW by 2030 figure; Hop-2 (chunk 162) gives the 83%-clean-grid advantage and up-to-90% emissions cut — the demand figure and the grid advantage are in separate chunks.

question: In Canada's National AI Strategy, how large is the LIFT program run by the Business Development Bank of Canada (BDC) to help SMEs adopt AI, and according to BDC what share of Canada's venture capital investment went to the ICT sector?
reference_answer: The LIFT program is a $500 million initiative from the Business Development Bank of Canada (BDC) to help Canadian SMEs access financing to incorporate AI tools in their operations. According to BDC, over half of all venture capital investments in Canada — 57% — went towards the information and communication technology (ICT) sector last year (with Canada ranking 5th globally in AI venture capital, $3.1B invested in 2025).
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 135) gives LIFT = $500M BDC initiative for SMEs; Hop-2 (chunk 193) gives BDC's 57%-to-ICT VC statistic — both facts hang off BDC but sit in different chunks.

question: Before becoming Comptroller of the Currency, what was Mr. Gould's role at the law firm Jones Day, and what academic degrees does he hold?
reference_answer: Before becoming Comptroller of the Currency, Mr. Gould was a partner at the law firm Jones Day (he had previously served as Senior Deputy Comptroller and Chief Counsel at the OCC and twice served on the staff of the U.S. Senate Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs, including as its Chief Counsel). He holds a bachelor's degree from Princeton University and a law degree from Washington and Lee University.
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 12) gives his professional background (partner at Jones Day, prior OCC and Senate roles); Hop-2 (chunk 13) gives his degrees (Princeton bachelor's, Washington and Lee law degree) — career and education are split across chunks.

question: In the OCC's financial statements, which employees does the Pentegra DB Plan cover, and what role did the OCC assume for the plan — under which law and in what year?
reference_answer: The Pentegra DB Plan covers those employees transferred from the former Office of Thrift Supervision (OTS) who elected the plan before January 1, 1991, when it was closed to new entrants (it is administered by the president of the plan). It is a tax-exempt, multiple-employer, defined-benefit pension plan for which the OCC assumed the role of benefit administrator in FY 2011, in accordance with the provisions of Dodd–Frank (as amended by the Economic Growth Act).
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 137) gives who the plan covers (former OTS employees who elected before Jan 1, 1991); Hop-2 (chunk 140) gives OCC's benefit-administrator role via Dodd–Frank in FY 2011 — coverage and OCC's role are in different chunks.

question: The church gave a $35,600 gift to JOY! Brazil from its One Great Hour of Sharing offering — what did that gift help JOY! Brazil purchase, and for what purpose?
reference_answer: The $35,600 gift from the One Great Hour of Sharing offering helped JOY! Brazil purchase much-needed updated technology to help their outreach efforts among unchurched youth.
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 82) gives the gift amount ($35,600) and source (One Great Hour of Sharing offering) to JOY! Brazil; Hop-2 (chunk 83) gives what it bought (updated technology) and the purpose (outreach among unchurched youth) — the sentence is split across the two chunks.

question: Under California's Urban Strategy, what two crime-related initiatives will the Office of Criminal Justice Planning undertake — one on community-based crime prevention and one on career criminals?
reference_answer: During the 1978-79 fiscal year the Office of Criminal Justice Planning will work with cities to develop four to six model community-based crime prevention programs, which will develop effective ways for citizens and local police to work together to reduce crime in neighborhoods. It will also assist and fund local district attorneys to prosecute 'career criminals' — those who commit repeated felonies — to increase the likelihood that career criminals are prosecuted (potentially including assigning experienced investigators and attorneys and reducing caseloads for attorneys prosecuting career criminals).
hop_note: Hop-1 (chunk 120) gives the community-based crime prevention program (four to six models in FY 1978-79); Hop-2 (chunk 122) gives the career-criminal prosecution initiative — two distinct programs of the same agency, each in its own chunk.
